Rajat's Blog

CNN Introduction

Alex Net

ResNet

Added skip connections to help the network learn deep representations

Adding more layers doesn't make the network perform worse as in previous networks like AlexNet or LeNet

1x1 convolution - Multipy each value in the layers with 1x1 conv individually. This is helpful in slice multiplication. I don't understand it clearly now. I will come back to this later. This layers is sometimes also called as the bottleneck layer

Inception network - Motivation: Instead of choose conv layers or pool layers you use all and check how your network is doing. We take all kinds of layers we want and stack them to see if it works better. The downside here is that it increases the computational cost.
In an inception network features from hidden layers are also used to make intermediate predictions about the result.
